title: melanthera amellus var. subhastata
intro: Melanthera amellus var. subhastata, also known as the White Calomeria, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Melanthera amellus var. subhastata include its potential to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, such as bloating and cramps, as well as its ability to support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
